2026-04-21T07:38:25.0255269Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0255815Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0256233Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0256599Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0256920Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0257346Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0257511Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-21T07:38:25.0257871Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0258104Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0258310Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0258601Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-21T07:38:25.0258864Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-21T07:45:24.9535170Z      - `ContainerSkill` - abstract base class for skills
2026-04-21T07:45:24.9535577Z      - `ContainerSkillType` - enum for skill types (Inline, SkillReference)
2026-04-21T07:45:24.9536002Z      - `LocalSkillParam` - local skill configuration with path

Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. Format: 'aw_' followed by 3 to 12 alphanumeric characters (e.g., 'aw_abc1', 'aw_Test123'). Use '#aw_ID' in body text to reference other issues by their temporary_id; these are replaced with actual issue numbers after creation.","pattern":"^aw_[A-Za-z0-9]{3,12}$","type":"string"},"title":{"description":"Concise issue title summarizing the bug, feature, or task. The title appears as the main heading, so keep it brief and descriptive.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","body"],"type":"object"},"name":"create_issue"},{"description":"Report that a tool or capability needed to complete the task is not available, or share any information you deem important about missing functionality or limitations. Be specific about what functionality is needed.","type":"string"}},"required":["reason"],"type":"object"},"name":"missing_tool"},{"description":"Log a transparency message when no significant actions are needed. Use this to confirm workflow completion and provide visibility when analysis is complete but no changes or outputs are required (e.g., 'No issues found', 'All checks passed'). This ensures the workflow produces human-visible output even when no other actions are taken.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"message":{"description":"Status or completion message to log. Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. The workflow framework will treat this as a failure signal even when the agent exits successfully.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"details":{"description":"Optional extended details or diagnostic context about the failure (max 65000 characters).","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"A concise explanation of why the task could not be completed (max 1024 characters). Pricesheet-\\u003ePriceSheet renames\\n\\nWindows case-insensitive FS caused the previous regen to overwrite the existing files in place; git tracked them as content-only modifications while the filenames retained the old casing. CI on Linux is case-sensitive and failed Verify Generated Code. Rename via git mv to record the case change.\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* refine comment\\n\\n* costmanagement: update tsp-location.yaml commit to merged spec SHA\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* costmanagement: obsolete TenantResource DownloadByBillingProfilePriceSheet shim\\n\\nThe underlying PriceSheet_DownloadByBillingProfile operation response changed from DownloadURL to PriceSheetDownloadProperties between api-version 2023-03-01 and 2025-03-01, and DownloadURL.ValidTill is no longer returned by the service. The backward-compat overloads on TenantResource (via CostManagementExtensions and MockableCostManagementTenantResource) cannot be losslessly adapted, so mark them [Obsolete] and throw NotSupportedException at runtime. Callers should migrate to the ArmClient.DownloadByBillingProfilePriceSheet extension which returns ArmOperation\\u003cPriceSheetDownloadProperties\\u003e. Update the generated sample to use the new API.\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* costmanagement: use safe 'as' cast for flattened collection properties\\n\\nReplace the hard (IReadOnlyList\\u003cT\\u003e) cast on QueryResult.Columns/Rows, ForecastResult.Columns/Rows and CostManagementDimension.Data with 'Properties?.X as IReadOnlyList\\u003cT\\u003e' to avoid an InvalidCastException if the generator ever emits a backing collection type that does not implement IReadOnlyList\\u003cT\\u003e. Matches the established pattern in Azure.ResourceManager.EventHubs and Azure.ResourceManager.DataBoxEdge.\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* costmanagement: regen after rebase; roll dropped id segments into scope\\n\\nNew emitter absorbs secondary id segments (billingProfileId, savingsPlanId, reservationId, billingProfileName, invoiceName) into the scope ResourceIdentifier and drops them as separate extension-method arguments.
